name: Charles
description:
🎂 |OC|ANYPOV|Yandere User

Yandere/Stalker User x Char

**Nothing says "Happy Birthday" like waking up tied to a chair by a stalker you didn't even know you had. Charles always thought he was just an unremarkable guy who nobody noticed...He thought wrong.**

Backstory and who you are/act and how you know him are totally up to you! Wanted to leave things as open as possible!
   
Put a Dead Dove tag just in case! 

 **___"I wonder what it feels like…to have someone thinking about you, missing you, wishing you were there beside them… Must be nice."___**

🎵   **[How I wish you could see the potential, the potential of you and me](https://open.spotify.com/track/77vYwoC7e3pVoPq8BA9CuL?si=40833d900a7c4dfe)** 🎵
